notes: Canonical implementation renders a Bootstrap <ul> dropdown-menu with icon/button/link variants. The three elements/* files are backward-compat wrappers that delegate to actions.dropdown-menu with different variant presets (icon, button, link). elements.dropdown alone has 39 references — callers need migration to actions.dropdown-menu before deletion.
Chip is an inline status/priority dropdown pill with colorized options and HTMX support. dropdownPill is a backward-compat wrapper (10 refs) that maps old API props to actions.chip (1 direct ref).
Custom dropdown that renders a <ul> menu with vanilla JS onclick handlers and stores selection in a hidden <input>. Functionally a dropdown but used as an inline form element. Unique — no duplicates.

Most-used component in the codebase (206 refs). Canonical version supports naming-doc API (contentRole, state, scale, leadingVisual, trailingVisual) plus v1 backward-compat aliases. Root button.blade.php is a wrapper with 0 direct refs — safe to delete.
Simple btn-group wrapper with vertical option. elements/button-group is a one-line backward-compat wrapper with 0 refs.
Canonical badge supports span/link rendering, dot mode, custom bgColor, and size/color variants. Root badge.blade.php is a backward-compat wrapper with 0 direct refs.
Canonical accordion with title/content/actionlink slots, toggle state persistence via $tpl->getToggleState(). Root accordion.blade.php is a backward-compat wrapper with 0 direct refs.

Three avatar implementations. elements/avatar is canonical (Tailwind utility classes, 5 sizes xs–xl, CRC32 color hashing, image fallback to initials). kanban/user-avatar is a near-identical copy using inline styles instead of Tailwind — same color palette, same CRC32 logic, same fallback pattern. Root avatar.blade.php is a backward-compat wrapper. kanban/user-avatar has 1 ref (swimlane-row-header) that should migrate to elements.avatar.
Canonical tabs component with headings/contents slots and jQuery tabs init. Root tabs.blade.php is a backward-compat wrapper with 0 direct refs.
Byte-identical copies (MD5: 1e1170492deb3996472563590ec1f784). Single-line <li><a> tab heading. tabs/heading has 0 refs — pure dead code.
Byte-identical copies (MD5: 734a4cdb5713e84bc5ec68d2ff7de4d2). Simple <div> tab content panel. tabs/content has 0 refs — pure dead code.
Canonical page header with icon, headline, subtitle, actions slot, and dispatchEvent hooks. Root pageheader.blade.php is a backward-compat wrapper with 0 direct refs.
Canonical HTMX loading indicator (htmx-indicator class, indeterminate spinner). Root loader.blade.php is a backward-compat wrapper with 0 direct refs.
Content placeholder skeleton supporting text, longtext, card, line, project, and plugincard types. Root loadingText.blade.php is a backward-compat wrapper with 0 direct refs.

Embossed progress bar with color-mix tracks and glossy fill. Root progress.blade.php is a backward-compat wrapper with 13 refs (all delegate to feedback.progress). feedback.progress itself has 1 direct ref. Callers of root progress.blade.php need migration before deletion.
Colored dot indicator with label. elements/status-indicator is a backward-compat wrapper mapping old props (status→state, size→scale). Each has 1 ref.

Canonical text input with naming-doc API (labelText, validationText, validationState, caption, scale). forms/input.blade.php is a backward-compat wrapper with 77 refs (most-used form input) — maps old props (label→labelText, error→validationText, help→caption, inputSize→scale). HIGH migration cost.
Generic form field wrapper with label, validation, caption. forms/form-group is a backward-compat wrapper with 0 refs — safe to delete.

Checkbox component has a built-in 'toggle' prop that renders toggle styling (tw:toggle tw:toggle-primary). forms/toggle.blade.php is a standalone toggle component that produces identical output to checkbox with toggle=true. toggle has 0 refs — pure dead code.
HTML <dialog> modal with header/body/actions slots, size variants (sm/md/lg/xl), closeable backdrop. No duplicates.
Deletion confirmation form with cancel/delete buttons. Used inside modals. No duplicates.
DaisyUI-style card with header/headerActions/actions slots, compact/bordered/glass variants. Only 1 reference — low adoption.
DaisyUI+Bootstrap hybrid table with striped/bordered/hover/compact/datatable options. 0 references — unused stub.
Empty state placeholder with undrawSvg image, headline, description, and actions slot. No duplicates.
Bootstrap alert with auto icon selection by state (info/success/warning/error), dismissible option. Only 1 ref — low adoption.
Native <select> form control with label, validation, bare mode. Third most-used form component. No duplicates.
Standard textarea with label, validation, caption. Consistent with text-input API. No duplicates.
Radio button with hx-vals fix for Blade ComponentAttributeBag escaping bug. No duplicates.
Date picker input using flatpickr (.dates class), optional time field. No duplicates.
Inline date picker — hidden input with calendar-plus icon trigger. Collapses when no value set. No duplicates.
File upload input with label, accept filter, bare mode. No duplicates.
Radio/checkbox disguised as clickable card with jQuery toggle logic and HTMX onLoad re-init. Legacy pattern — uses jQuery event handlers. No duplicates.
Text input with emoji picker button. Includes inline <script> and <style> blocks. 0 references — unused. Uses EmojiPicker JS constructor and jQuery. Candidate for removal.

Minimal wrapper:
{{ $slot }}
. 0 references — unused stub.
Widget panel with title, icon, and optional titleActions slot. 0 references — unused stub.
Stub: placeholder for future select panel implementation. 0 references — unused.
Stub: placeholder nav wrapper. 0 references — unused.
Stub: placeholder nav wrapper. 0 references — unused.
Stub: placeholder nav wrapper. 0 references — unused.
Renders a horizontal flex row of links from an array. Unique component, no duplicates.
Inlines SVG files from /dist/images/svg/ with configurable sizing. Heavily used (32 refs) for illustrations throughout the app. No duplicates.
Expandable multi-segment progress bar showing status breakdown per swimlane. No duplicates.
Emoji milestone indicator (target emoji). No duplicates.
Emoji sprint indicator (runner emoji). No duplicates.
Kanban swimlane sidebar with dynamic icon resolution, micro-progress-bar, expand/collapse. Uses kanban.user-avatar (should migrate to elements.avatar). No duplicates.
SVG thermometer icon for priority visualization using TicketDesignTokens. No duplicates.
Emoji time-urgency indicator (dueSoon/overdue/stale). No duplicates.
SVG t-shirt icon for effort/story-point visualization using TicketDesignTokens. No duplicates.
Emoji type indicator (task/bug/story/etc) using TicketDesignTokens. No duplicates.
